title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 254.085 - State land may retain classification indefinitely
text:
254.085.  State land may retain classification indefinitely. — Any lands owned by the state of Missouri, used by the commission, and classified as forest cropland as defined in this chapter may retain such classification for an indefinite period, so long as said lands continue to be used by the commission.
(L. 1974 H.B. 1210)
